title: Better Emerald Generation (BEG!)
description: A mod that makes emerald ores biome independent, to make it worth going mining for them.
body:
This mod changes the ore generation of emerald ore, so it actually feels worth it, if you decide to go mining for them.

**Generation**
Emeralds now generate everywhere, from height -64 to 0.
And 3 times as much at height 80 to 160.

**Extra Emeralds**
This also keeps the vanilla generation, so you can find extra emeralds in mountain or windswept biomes.
